verdict: A decent Medium chart with natural foot flow, held back by a few technical errors including an illegal 3-panel jump (hand) and stray 16th notes.

issues.problem: Requires a 3-panel press (JUMP LR while HOLD D is active), creating an illegal 'hand' alignment for a Medium difficulty chart.
Stray 16th-note step immediately after 57.012 creates an unintended gallop/rhythm error.
A fast 16th-note stream (U-R-L) right at the end of the song represents an inconsistent difficulty spike.
